summary: This bundle records deterministic proof that runner-readiness branches expose the stable action shape required by the runner-readiness contract.

evidenceScope.claimBoundary: Only runner-readiness nextBranch records are marked satisfied; broader agent-status branch catalog completeness remains separate.
notClaimed: Every possible agent-status branch is present in one packet
Runner smoke execution is implemented as a separate branch
Claim-state branches use the exact same runner-readiness branch schema

notableAssertions: runner-readiness branches expose id, label, reason, owningSurface, runnerId, and boolean writesFiles
runner-readiness branches expose either requiredArtifact or requiredCommand
missing assessment and upgrade assessment branches point at assessment artifacts and scaffold source
the ready branch exposes a required eval command
agent status places the runner-readiness branch before claim-state branches when runner setup blocks honest evaluation

decision.reason: The runtime branch builder now exposes requiredArtifact or requiredCommand alongside stable branch identity fields, and focused tests cover create, bind, upgrade, address-gaps, ready, and agent-status ordering cases.
